Package io.simonis.jballoon

Class JBalloon.Balloon

java.lang.Object
io.simonis.jballoon.JBalloon.Balloon
Enclosing class:
JBalloon
public static class JBalloon.Balloon extends Object
A lightweight handle class for managing memory balloons. This class holds an internal long[] array which backs up the memory balloon.

Balloon instances are created automatically by JBalloon on every successful call to JBalloon.inflate(long) or JBalloon.inflate(long[]) and have to be kept alive if the application plans to eventually deflate the balloon again by passing the Balloon object to JBalloon.deflate(Balloon).

The backing long[] of a Balloon only becomes accessible once the Balloon is deflated (see JBalloon.deflate(Balloon)).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    balloonSize()
    Returns the inflated size in bytes of this Balloon.
    long
    heapSize()
    Returns the size in bytes occupied by the long[] which backs up this Balloon.

  • Method Details

    • heapSize

      public long heapSize()
      Returns the size in bytes occupied by the long[] which backs up this Balloon. This is typically larger than balloonSize().
      Returns:
      the size in bytes of the backing long[] or 0 if this Balloon is already deflated.

    • balloonSize

      public long balloonSize()
      Returns the inflated size in bytes of this Balloon. This is usually smaller than heapSize().
      Returns:
      the inflated size in bytes of this Balloon or 0 if this Balloon is already deflated.

    • toString
